items.title: Colts, Daniel Jones agree on new contract
items.summary: INDIANAPOLIS – The Indianapolis Colts and Daniel Jones are transitioning from the transition tag. The team and its starting quarterback agreed on a 2-year, $88 million extension that replaces the one-year, $37.833 million transition tag that was put in place March 3, according to a source. Jones could earn up to $100 million in incentives [...]

items.title: Braden Smith relocates to Houston Texans
items.summary: INDIANAPOLIS – The Indianapolis Colts have lost another veteran. Long-time starting right tackle Braden Smith has agreed to a two-year, $25 million free-agent contract with the AFC South rival Houston Texans, according to multiple reports. The deal includes $13.5 million in guarantees. Smith, 29, has started 105 games since being selected in the second round [...]
